ELR Name: STAFFORD NORTH - CREWE 157M20C
Free Text:
"A barrier prevents vehicles above 3.5T from parking within Betley Road VAP (Up Fast/Main) without partially blocking the highway (Den Lane). 
The access point allows for a vehicle to enter near to open lines, there is a barrier preventing a vehicle from fouling the open line. 
The barrier on-site is a pedestrian barrier used at access points and not designed to prevent a vehicle from fouling the open line (light-weight, GRP-type).

Potential hazards: 
- Stationary rail worker's vehicle protrudes beyond railway infrastructure, partially obstructing highway (vehicle parked in VAP) leading to road traffic collision.
- Rail worker's vehicle collides with pedestrian barrier leading to damaged barrier obstructing the running line and/or rail worker's vehicle inadvertently stopped foul of the open line. 
Proposed control: Vehicles above 3.5T only able to use the RAP when the adjacent line is blocked/protected."
